title: Wolf's Den 4
description: Master intricate machinery with the Create mod, explore a breathtakingly overhauled world, and conquer a deep culinary system in this definitive, performance-optimized 1.21.1 adventure.
body:
# Wolf's Den 4
> ### Your Ultimate Create & Exploration Adventure, Refined.

Welcome back to the Den! Wolf's Den 4 is the latest evolution of the series, meticulously crafted for builders, engineers, explorers, and adventurers. Built on the modern 1.21.1 foundation, this pack focuses on a core experience of unparalleled automation with **Create**, deep culinary and farming systems with **Farmer's Delight**, and a breathtaking world to explore, all while maintaining exceptional performance.

Whether you're a seasoned factory foreman or a wanderer seeking new horizons, your perfect world awaits.

---
## Core Pillars of the Pack

### ⚙️ The Age of Automation with Create
At its heart, Wolf's Den 4 is a love letter to the **Create** mod and its incredible ecosystem. We've included a massive collection of addons to give you limitless possibilities:
*   Construct sprawling, automated factories with addons like **Create: Sifter**, **Mechanical Extruder**, and **Simple Ore Doubling**.
*   Master logistics with **Create: Railways**, **Mobile Packages**, and **Hypertubes**.
*   Become a culinary powerhouse by automating your kitchen with **Create: Central Kitchen** and **Slice & Dice**.
*   Take to the skies with **Create: Jetpacks** and build incredible contraptions with **Copycats+** and **Pattern Schematics**.
*   Automate your enchanting, mob farming, and more with **Enchantment Industry** and **Mechanical Spawners**. Your imagination is the only limit!

### 🍓 A Culinary Revolution
Leave simple bread and steak behind! With **Farmer's Delight** and a smorgasbord of delicious addons like **Expanded Delight**, **Chef's Delight**, **Pizza Delight**, and **More Delight**, you'll embark on a true culinary journey.
*   Build a proper kitchen with new workstations and tools.
*   Discover dozens of new crops and recipes that provide powerful, long-lasting effects.
*   Organize it all with **Storage Delight** and the beautiful barrels and chests from **Sophisticated Storage**.

### 🗺️ A World Reimagined for Exploration
The world of Wolf's Den 4 is anything but vanilla. Prepare to be awestruck by breathtaking landscapes and uncover hidden treasures in a world teeming with new structures and challenges.
*   **YUNG's entire suite** is here, completely overhauling Mineshafts, Strongholds, Dungeons, Ocean Monuments, and so much more!
*   Brave the terrifying new dimension of the **Deeper and Darker**.
*   Traverse a visually stunning and dangerous Nether with **Incendium** and **Amplified Nether**.
*   Discover new structures like **Dungeons and Taverns** and **Luki's Grand Capitals**.
*   Never get lost again with **JourneyMap** and find what you need with **Nature's Compass**.

### 👹 Creatures, Dangers, and Overhauls
The world is not only bigger, but more alive... and more dangerous. Mobs have been given a new lease on life with stunning visual and mechanical overhauls.
*   Face off against terrifying new variants from **Creeper Overhaul** and **Enderman Overhaul**.
*   Defend villages from **Illager Invasions** and hire **Guard Villagers** to protect your interests.
*   Discover rare and powerful loot from **Artifacts** and raid instanced chests with **Lootr** without stealing from your friends.

### 🏠 Build Your Perfect Den
An engineer's factory and an adventurer's base both need to feel like home. We've included a fantastic selection of aesthetic and building mods to help you create your masterpiece.
*   Decorate your base with a huge selection of items from **Another Furniture**.
*   Utilize thousands of new building block variants with **Chipped**.
*   Add a touch of magic with **Snow! Real Magic!** and add beautiful art with **Immersive Paintings**.

---
## Performance & Quality of Life
A large modpack is no fun if it doesn't run well. Wolf's Den 4 is built from the ground up for a smooth and responsive experience.
*   **Optimized to the Core:** Featuring a modern performance suite including **Embeddium, Lithium, ModernFix, EntityCulling,** and **ImmediatelyFast**.
*   **Breathtaking Views:** **Distant Horizons** is included, allowing you to see your incredible world and massive factories from incredible distances.
*   **Essential Tools:** All the QoL you expect is here: **EMI** for recipes, **Sophisticated Backpacks** for on-the-go storage, **Waystones** for fast travel, **Mouse Tweaks** for easy inventory management, and **Simple Voice Chat** for seamless communication.

---

The forge is lit, the blueprints are ready, and a vast world awaits.

**I truly hope you enjoy my modpack as much as I do. Happy Minecrafting.**
